gaps.snippet: # [doc = " The **closed** v0 recovery-action set (¬ß4.4; ¬ß8 resolved). Each action yields an explicit"] # [doc = " outcome ‚Äî a recovered value or a re-propagated error ‚Äî never a silent drop (I1)."] # [derive (Debug , Clone , PartialEq)] pub enum RecoveryAction { # [doc = " Recover with an explicit fallback value. The recovered value is honestly tagged **`Declared`**"] # [doc = " (a substituted fallback has no checked basis ‚Äî I2/VR-5; recovery only ever downgrades)."] Fallback { # [doc = " The fallback value (boxed ‚Äî it is much larger than the other actions' fields)."] value : Box < Value > , } , # [doc = " Re-attempt the operation, **bounded** by `max_attempts` (I4). If every attempt fails the"] # [doc = " original error **continues to propagate** (additive ‚Äî a policy is never a silent terminator)."] Retry { # [doc = " The maximum number of attempts."] max_attempts : u64 , } , # [doc = " Transform and re-propagate as another (registry-resolved) error class ‚Äî still explicit."] Escalate { # [doc = " The class to escalate to."] to : ClassName , } , # [doc = " Run a **bounded** effect (consuming from the ambient budget ledger), then let the original"] # [doc = " error continue (additive). The effect's budget lives in the [`super::effect::Budgets`] ledger"] # [doc = " (one enforcement mechanism); a budget overrun is a graceful `EffectBudgetExhausted` that skips"] # [doc = " the cleanup, and the original error propagates regardless."] CleanupThenPropagate { # [doc = " The effect the cleanup performs (its budget is declared in the ambient ledger; I5)."] effect : EffectKind , } , }

gaps.snippet: impl RecoveryPolicy { # [doc = " An empty policy."] # [must_use] pub fn new () -> Self { RecoveryPolicy :: default () } # [doc = " Add an action for `class`, **resolving the class name through the registry** (X1). Replaces and"] # [doc = " returns any prior action for the class."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " Returns [`UnknownClass`] if `class` is not in `registry` ‚Äî an explicit configuration error."] pub fn on (& mut self , registry : & ClassRegistry , class : & str , action : RecoveryAction ,) -> Result < Option < RecoveryAction > , UnknownClass > { let name = registry . resolve (class) ? ; Ok (self . rules . insert (name , action)) } # [doc = " The recovery action for a resolved class, if any."] # [must_use] pub fn action_for (& self , class : & ClassName) -> Option < & RecoveryAction > { self . rules . get (class) } # [doc = " The rules, in deterministic (class-sorted) order."] pub fn rules (& self) -> impl Iterator < Item = (& ClassName , & RecoveryAction) > { self . rules . iter () } # [doc = " Whether the policy has no rules."] # [must_use] pub fn is_empty (& self) -> bool { self . rules . is_empty () } # [doc = " The **content address** of this policy (RFC-0005 `PolicyRef`; ADR-006) ‚Äî a deterministic BLAKE3"] # [doc = " over its canonical, sorted rules. Diffable and identity-stable."] # [must_use] pub fn content_id (& self) -> ContentHash { let mut h = blake3 :: Hasher :: new () ; let blob = | hasher : & mut blake3 :: Hasher , bytes : & [u8] | { hasher . update (& (bytes . len () as u64) . to_le_bytes ()) ; hasher . update (bytes) ; } ; blob (& mut h , b"mycelium.recovery-policy.v1") ; h . update (& (self . rules . len () as u64) . to_le_bytes ()) ; for (class , action) in & self . rules { blob (& mut h , class . as_str () . as_bytes ()) ; match action { RecoveryAction :: Fallback { value } => { h . update (& [0u8]) ; blob (& mut h , value . content_hash () . as_str () . as_bytes ()) ; } RecoveryAction :: Retry { max_attempts } => { h . update (& [1u8]) ; h . update (& max_attempts . to_le_bytes ()) ; } RecoveryAction :: Escalate { to } => { h . update (& [2u8]) ; blob (& mut h , to . as_str () . as_bytes ()) ; } RecoveryAction :: CleanupThenPropagate { effect } => { h . update (& [3u8]) ; blob (& mut h , effect . to_string () . as_bytes ()) ; } } } let hex = h . finalize () . to_hex () ; ContentHash :: from_parts ("blake3" , hex . as_str ()) . expect ("blake3 hex is a valid digest") } }
